keyword.title: Job Title / Keyword
keyword.description: Job title to search on Naukri. Examples: 'Delivery Manager', 'Scrum Master', 'Project Manager', 'Software Engineer'

location.title: City / Location
location.description: Indian city to search jobs in. Examples: Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Chennai, Pune, Delhi, Remote

experience.title: Minimum Years of Experience
experience.description: Filter jobs requiring at least this many years of experience. Examples: 5, 8, 10, 15

freshness.title: Job Freshness (days)
freshness.description: Only return jobs posted within last N days. Use 1 for last 24 hours (recommended for fresh results), 3 for last 3 days, 7 for last week.

maxItems.title: Max Results
maxItems.description: Maximum number of job listings to scrape and return. Keep low (10–20) to save compute credits.

maxPages.title: Max Pages to Crawl
maxPages.description: How many Naukri search result pages to crawl. 1 page = ~20 jobs. Set to 2 or 3 for more results.
